output.final_deliverable:
I could not complete the requested page-to-page path because the browsing/visit results needed to document each step are missing from the merged results you provided. The user mandate included two explicit URLs (start and target), which I list below, but I do not have any visit outputs showing page contents or which links were followed. According to your instructions I must use only evidence present in the merged results; because those merged results are empty, I cannot claim any intermediate pages or link adjacency. Required/missing items (please provide or allow me to fetch them so I can produce the full documented path):

1) Provided start and target URLs (from your mandate):
   - Start page (given): 1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence
   - Target page (given): 2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantum_computing

2) Missing visit evidence for each step (I need at least one of the following):
   - The full HTML/text or a page snapshot for https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence showing the outgoing links on that page (so I can identify which link I would follow next).
   - For each intermediate page you want documented: the page content or a visit result showing the exact link clicked to the next page.
   - A final visit result for https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantum_computing confirming arrival.

3) Extraction items I must produce once I have the visit results (and which are currently missing):
   - A numbered ordered list of every Wikipedia page visited in order, with full URLs for each page.
   - For each visited page: the exact link (anchor text and URL) that I clicked to continue to the next page; or an explicit statement if the link was found in a specific section of the page (e.g., "Found link to X in section 'See also' -> URL").
   - An explanation for why I chose that link (topic connection), supported by quoted text or visible section headings from the page that show the topical relation.
   - Explicit adjacency verification: for each i, evidence that URL[i] contains a link to URL[i+1] (i.e., a snippet or excerpt showing the link or the link URL listed among page links).

4) If you prefer I perform the browsing for you now, tell me to proceed and I will fetch (visit) the start page and subsequent pages and produce the full documented path. If you prefer to provide page snapshots instead, please attach the page contents (or merged visit results) in order starting from the Artificial intelligence page.

What I cannot provide yet (due to missing evidence):
- Any intermediate page names, URLs, or the specific chain of links from the AI page to the Quantum computing page. I have not been given visit outputs or link lists, so I must not invent or assume any intermediate steps.

Next steps I can take once you respond with permission or page data:
- Option A (recommended): I will fetch/visit https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence and then follow links stepwise, documenting each visited page with quoted evidence and full URLs until I reach https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantum_computing. I will return the ordered list of pages, the exact links clicked (anchor text and target URLs), and adjacency verification (showing which URL contains which link) as you required.
- Option B: You can paste the HTML/text snapshots or the merged visit results for the pages and I will extract and produce the requested documented path from those snapshots.

Please tell me which option you prefer (I can proceed to fetch the pages now), or provide the missing merged visit results so I can continue.
output.action_summary: I cannot complete the requested documented path because the merged browsing/visit results are empty. I have the start and target URLs you provided (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence and https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantum_computing) but I lack the page contents and visit evidence needed to list intermediate pages, the exact links clicked, and adjacency verification. Reply to let me fetch the pages now or provide the page snapshots, and I will produce the full step-by-step path with URLs and link evidence.

reasons: The agent did not produce any path from the Artificial Intelligence page to the Quantum Computing page and therefore failed the primary task requirement to reach and document the Quantum Computing page.

The agent correctly refused to invent intermediate steps without browse/visit evidence and clearly listed the exact evidence it needed to proceed (start/target URLs, page snapshots or visit results, and extraction items). This is appropriate and cautious behavior given the constraint to use only provided merged results.

The agent's output is incomplete/truncated (it ends mid-sentence), so it did not fully present next-action instructions or finalize a clear plan for performing the browsing steps even though it asked for permission to proceed.

Because no intermediate pages, links clicked, or adjacency evidence were provided, none of the required documentation items (ordered list of pages, link snippets, adjacency verification, explanations with quoted text) were produced.
